title: Werewolf
description: Single-device role dealer: configure classic roles, pass-and-flip secret reveal — for in-person play

villager.name: Villager
villager.desc: Good team, no skill. Vote out wolves during the day.

werewolf.name: Werewolf
werewolf.desc: Pick a kill each night; disguise as a villager by day and vote out the good team.

wolfKing.name: Wolf King
wolfKing.desc: An upgraded werewolf. When voted out or killed, may shoot another player.

seer.name: Seer
seer.desc: Each night, check one player to see whether they are good or wolf.

witch.name: Witch
witch.desc: Has one save potion and one poison potion. Each may be used once per game; killed by poison, you cannot use end-of-game skills.

hunter.name: Hunter
hunter.desc: When voted out or killed by wolves, may shoot another player (disabled if poisoned).

guard.name: Guard
guard.desc: Protects one player each night from being killed; cannot guard the same person two nights in a row.

idiot.name: Idiot
idiot.desc: Flips their card when voted out — immune to that elimination — and loses voting rights afterwards but can still speak.

cupid.name: Cupid
cupid.desc: On the first night, pairs two players as lovers; if one dies the other dies too. Forms a third party if lovers are on opposing teams.

setup.title: Role composition
setup.namesHint: Phone will be passed in this order during dealing

warnings.wolfTooMany: Wolves cannot equal or exceed the good team

reveal.privateHint: Make sure only you can see
